name: RowCtRunCycUpd_EE

text.value: WITH cte AS (SELECT TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD, MAX(RUN_CYC_NO) AS RUN_CYC_NO FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE TRGT_SYS_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.TrgtSys}' AND SRC_SYS_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.SrcSys}' AND SUBJ_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.SubjCd}' AND ROW_CT_BAL_IN = 'N' AND RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.BeginCycle} GROUP BY TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD) UPDATE T SET ROW_CT_BAL_IN = 'Y' FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC T INNER JOIN cte ON T.TRGT_SYS_CD = cte.TRGT_SYS_CD AND T.SRC_SYS_CD = cte.SRC_SYS_CD AND T.SUBJ_CD = cte.SUBJ_CD AND T.RUN_CYC_NO <= cte.RUN_CYC_NO WHERE T.ROW_CT_BAL_IN = 'N'

Annotations:
Extract P_RUN_CYC records for IDS Product with a value \"N\" in the  ROW_CT_BAL_IN where the run cycle is >= to the current run cycle used for extracting.
Set ROW_CT_BAL_IN to 'Y'
Update the P_RUN_CYC table to indicate source system data has been balanced with respect to IDS for each of the run cycles processed.
Balancing Row Count Balancing Indicator Update
Job name:
RowCtRunCycUpd_EE
